theorems.name: putnam_1962_b2
theorems.statement: ∃ f : ℝ → Set ℕ+, ∀ a b : ℝ, a < b → f a ⊂ f b

theorems.name: putnam_1962_b3
theorems.statement: ∀ (S : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))) (hS : Convex ℝ S ∧ 0 ∈ S) (htopo : (0 ∈ interior S) ∨ IsClosed S) (hray : ∀ P : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), P ≠ 0 → ∃ Q : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2), SameRay ℝ P Q ∧ Q ∉ S), Bornology.IsBounded S

theorems.name: putnam_1963_b2
theorems.statement: ∀ (S : Set ℝ) (hS : S = {2 ^ m * 3 ^ n | (m : ℤ) (n : ℤ)}), closure S ⊇ Set.Ioi (0 : ℝ) ↔ putnam_1963_b2_solution

theorems.name: putnam_1965_b4
theorems.statement:
∀ (f u v : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ) (hu : ∀ n > 0, ∀ x, u n x = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 0 (n / 2), (n.choose (2 * i)) * x ^ i) (hv : ∀ n > 0, ∀ x, v n x = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 0 ((n - 1) / 2), (n.choose (2 * i + 1)) * x ^ i) (hf : ∀ n > 0, ∀ x, f n x = u n x / v n x) (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n), let ⟨⟨p, q⟩, ⟨s, g⟩⟩ := putnam_1965_b4_solution
 (∀ x, v n x ≠ 0 → v (n + 1) x ≠ 0 → q (f n) x ≠ 0 → f (n + 1) x = p (f n) x / q (f n) x) ∧
 s = {x | ∃ l, Filter.Tendsto (fun n ↦ f n x) Filter.atTop (nhds l)} ∧
 ∀ x ∈ s, Filter.Tendsto (fun n ↦ f n x) Filter.atTop (nhds (g x))

theorems.name: putnam_1966_b1
theorems.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 3) (L : ZMod n → (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))) (hsq : ∀ i : ZMod n, L i 0 ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 ∧ L i 1 ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hnoncol : ∀ i j k : ZMod n, i ≠ j ∧ j ≠ k ∧ k ≠ i → ¬Collinear ℝ {L i, L j, L k}) (hconvex : ∀ i : ZMod n, segment ℝ (L i) (L (i + 1)) ∩ interior (convexHull ℝ {L j | j : ZMod n}) = ∅), ∑ i : Fin n, (dist (L i) (L (i + 1)))^2 ≤ 4

theorems.name: putnam_1967_a5
theorems.statement: ∀ (R : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))) (hR : Convex ℝ R ∧ (MeasureTheory.volume R).toReal > Real.pi / 4), ∃ P ∈ R, ∃ Q ∈ R, dist P Q = 1

theorems.name: putnam_1967_b3
theorems.statement: ∀ (f g : ℝ → ℝ) (fgcont : Continuous f ∧ Continuous g) (fgperiod : Function.Periodic f 1 ∧ Function.Periodic g 1), Filter.Tendsto (fun n : ℤ => ∫ x in Set.Ioo 0 1, f x * g (n * x)) Filter.atTop (nhds ((∫ x in Set.Ioo 0 1, f x) * (∫ x in Set.Ioo 0 1, g x)))

theorems.name: putnam_1968_a2
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c d e f : ℤ) (ε : ℝ) (hne : a * d ≠ b * c) (hε : ε > 0), ∃ r s : ℚ, (|r * a + s * b - e| : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioo 0 ε ∧ (|r * c + s * d - f| : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioo 0 ε

theorems.name: putnam_1968_b1
theorems.statement:
∀ {Ω : Type*} [MeasureSpace Ω] [IsProbabilityMeasure (ℙ : Measure Ω)] (X Y : Ω → ℤ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hX' : Set.Finite (X '' Set.univ)) (hY' : Set.Finite (Y '' Set.univ)) (k : ℤ), (ℙ {ω : Ω | min (X ω) (Y ω) = k}).toReal =
 putnam_1968_b1_solution (ℙ (X⁻¹' {k})).toReal (ℙ (Y⁻¹' {k})).toReal
 (ℙ {ω : Ω | max (X ω) (Y ω) = k}).toReal
